title: Change column value on Webkook using its response

posts.author: afxgroup (Andrea Palmatè)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’ve successfull created and used a webhook using mutation and create_webhook. It is called and challenge is working too. Now my question is.
How can I get the answer from API url call and update a column (for example)?
Is there a way to do this via js code or other kind of stuff?
Thank you

posts.author: Leandre_R (Léandre @LaBriqueJaune)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @afxgroup,

I use webhooks with the tool make.com.
If you are okay to use it, I can explain how to change a column value through Make!

Best regards,

Léandre

posts.author: afxgroup (Andrea Palmatè)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it free? And however I prefer (if possible) to avoid to add a new layer. Is not possible to do whis wth “plain” Monday?
